name: family-store
description: Family Store — Kolhapur Municipal Services (monorepo root)

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: npx concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.test: npm run test:run --prefix frontend && npm test --prefix backend
scripts.docker:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up --build -d
